name: Just Tanks
author: Poki
description: Just Tanks is a platform game which as simple as the name shows, is just you drive all kinds of cool tanks through various levels! Shoot colorful paint from your tank guns and use the recoil to propel yourself forward. Navigate through different platforms and obstacles, using them to your advantage. Whether you’re having fun exploring or heading straight to the destination, it's all about you and your tanks! Are you ready for some tank-driving fun? How to play Just Tanks? Click and hold to shoot. You can also press any key to shoot. Who created Just Tanks? Just Tanks is created by TD2TL. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Just Tanks for free? You can play Just Tanks for free on Poki. Can I play Just Tanks on mobile devices and desktop? Just Tanks can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
